Nanjing Langguang Electronics Co., Ltd. presents a striking example of a highly capitalized, foreign-invested joint stock company that has entirely ceased its core high-tech manufacturing operations, pivoting to become an industrial real estate landlord. The critical indicator lies at the end of its business scope: 'leasing of own housing; property management; parking lot services'.
